textByHash.036c8b99c491503df196181257bdfff4365ecbf3: We'll look for someone who wants to buy those items at your price, and we'll perform the trade. You can then collect the cash here, or at any bank.
textByHash.72fad8e6c936fa5ef522beb1ad98ebe59cd1d387: My colleague and I can let you set up trade offers. You can offer to Sell items or Buy items.
textByHash.7f4a8343b7f18d4982662ba6fa566b3d0624a5a3: We'll look for someone who's selling those items at your price, and we'll perform the trade. You can then collect the items here, or at any bank, along with any left-over cash.
textByHash.8109935d1b89c9fac7a1ddf20a282254deec729d: When you want to buy something, you tell us what you want, and give us the cash you're willing to spend on it.
textByHash.881d8dd6ee91928f34d6b3a02566d851e3efc157: If you wanted to, you could store the coins in the bank next to me.
textByHash.8ca24cf410a2469a532399e0ed446163d5f63585: Okay, when you log in, we'll send you a message about any items that are waiting for you to collect them.
textByHash.90105300b0cdd83bde93c84c2f48eb901fe47cbf: That's all the essential information you need to get started. Would you like to trade now, or exchange item sets?
textByHash.95a446e9e46949e3e3643bcf83638312633b7ad5: Is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.9e9641f41d7609cf2021e819c7607abad0432d61: Okay, when you log in, you will no longer be reminded about items waiting to be collected, unless the items only arrived after you logged out.
textByHash.a240923eea63f80af772497224f8d9599b1d6478: Why yes, here is your reward.
textByHash.ab6ca6c866e33b3a3b3017f742302fd11e47d7b3: Welcome to the Grand Exchange. Would you like to trade now, or exchange item sets?
textByHash.c0290b86415d55837bd197282a100906c220a7c3: When you want to sell something, you give us the items and tell us how much money you want for them.
textByHash.c61a29cd6a1b3af8f30dde2d17ecba7e0a4f7525: Sometimes it takes a while to find a matching trade offer. If you change your mind, we'll let you cancel your trade offer, and we'll return your unused items and cash.
